summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of the Student Driver Profile Generator REMC application. All major features tested successfully including profile generation, display components, course history, competency evaluation grid, and pedagogical objectives.
passed_tests: Profile Generator button click generates a new profile successfully
Profile Display shows student name, age, gender, occupation, residence, siblings, mobility correctly
Profile Display shows progression percentage (97-100%) and covered sub-competencies count correctly
Context section displays hobbies, parents professions, special needs (when applicable), and motivation properly
Course History shows total hours, real driving hours, simulator hours with correct calculations
Course History shows enrollment date, last lesson date, vehicle used, context, student feedback in French format
Competency Grid displays all 4 competencies (C1 blue, C2 emerald, C3 amber, C4 purple) with correct color coding
Each competency card is expandable/collapsible functionality working correctly
Sub-competencies show correct status badges (Fort/Moyen/Faible/Non abordé) with appropriate color coding
Pedagogical Objectives section shows prioritized objectives based on weak competencies
Generate new profile button updates all displayed data correctly
Toast notification appears on successful profile generation with student details
